logo_guidance.preferred_format: SVG or PNG with transparent background
logo_guidance.colors_on_dark: White or accent-green version required for nav/footer on dark background
logo_guidance.colors_on_light: Full color or dark version for light section use

icon_guidance.service_icons: Outlined style icons (not filled), 24x24. Use Heroicons or Phosphor Icons. Match primary or accent color.

badge_guidance.bbb_badge: White/monochrome SVG. Place in trust bar above nav. Height 28px.
badge_guidance.google_badge: Stars + rating count. Inline text with Google logo SVG.

pattern_guidance.leaf_motif: Subtle leaf silhouette used as corner overlays or section dividers. Opacity 0.06-0.08 on primary sections.
pattern_guidance.usage: optional decorative elements only — never structural
